title: Calvaria bojeriana

The classification of Calvaria bojeriana includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Magnoliophyta. Its class is Magnoliopsida and its order is Ericales. Calvaria bojeriana is further classified into the family Sapotaceae and the genus Calvaria.
